summary: Good‑quality recording that improves after the first half, highlighted by a blistering Wheel > The Other One on a strong second set.
review: Both reviewers note that the tape gets clearer around Peggy‑O and really shines in the second set. The performance is praised for its groove, especially the Wheel > Other One stretch that “goes off the charts,” while the early part of the show feels a bit rough. Overall the presentation is considered outstanding for both head‑phones and speakers.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is highlighted as excellent (standout Wheel > Other One, solid second set) while recording quality improves part‑way; two reviews give a combined average of 3.5 stars, nudging the rating toward a strong 4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound is described as getting better around Peggy‑O and reaching an outstanding level in the second set; overall presentation praised for clarity once it improves.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First half feels a bit uneven, but the tape lifts around Peggy‑O and the second set delivers a great ride with strong musical dynamics.

band_member_comments.Phil: Takes The Other One to the point of no return, sounding loose and powerful.
band_member_comments.Keys: First Wheel for Brent noted in the comments.
